zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Garrard於大約1530年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir William Garrard11528歲，母親Isabella Nethermill24歲。她於大約1557年與George Barne在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1611年12月31日在她的家鄉享年82歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Garrard于大约1530年出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir William Garrard11528岁，母亲Isabella Nethermill24岁。她于大约1557年与George Barne在英国英格兰倫敦结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1611年12月31日在她的家乡享年82岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Garrard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Gerard  .
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Gerard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Jean-Pierre, Murielle, Emile, Pascal, Pierre, Agathe, Alain, Aldes, Antoine, Armand.

French (Gérard), Walloon (mainly Gérard), and English (of Norman origin): from the personal name Gérard, Gerard (from Old French Gerart, Girart), composed of the ancient Germanic elements gēr ‘spear, lance’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. As a surname of French origin it is also found in Haiti. Compare Garrard and also French Guerard , English Garard , Gerrard , and Jarrard .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Garrard was born about 1530, in England, her father, Sir William Garrard, was 11528 and her mother, Isabella Nethermill, was 24. She married George Barne about 1557, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 31 December 1611, in her hometown, at the age of 82, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Garrard est née environ 1530, à Angleterre, son père, Sir William Garrard, avait 11528 ans et sa mère, Isabella Nethermill, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé George Barne environ 1557, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 décembre 1611, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

Sie hat um 1557 in London, England, United Kingdom George Barne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Garrard è nata il circa 1530 nel England, sua padre, Sir William Garrard, aveva 11528 anni e sua madre, Isabella Nethermill, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato George Barne circa 1557, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 31 dicembre 1611, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Garrardが約1530年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir William Garrardは11528歳，母Isabella Nethermillは24歳であった。約1557年にイギリスイギリスロンドンでGeorge Barneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1611年12月31日に故郷で82歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Garrard(이)가 대략 1530년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Garrard(은)는 11528세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Nethermill(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1557년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 George Barne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1611년 12월 31일 그녀의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Garrard nasceu aproximadamente 1530, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Garrard, tinha 11528 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Nethermill, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com George Barne aproximadamente 1557, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de dezembro de 1611, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Garrard родилась около 1530 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Garrard было 11528 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Nethermill, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени George Barne около 1557 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 31 декабря 1611 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Garrard nació aproximadamente 1530, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Garrard, tenía 11528 años y su mamá, Isabella Nethermill, tenía 24 años. Se casó con George Barne aproximadamente 1557, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 31 de diciembre de 1611, en su pueblo, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
